title: Dueling Metal Hilt 7 Colors Changeable FX Lightsaber, 3 Sound Fonts Black Series Light for Real Heavy Dueling for Star Wars Cosplay Party, Birthday Gift(77cm-Black)
features: ⚔【ALUMINUM LIGHT HILT】Lightsaber hilt is made of a durable aviation aluminum alloy, nice polished & comfortable grip, hard to be scratched. Bringing you a real fighting experience. Two Sabers can be merge to a double blade saber.

⚔【SMOOTH SWING】The basic smooth swing technology added realism by giving off that sound and light flash each time you touch something automatically, it looks stunning and deflected a blaster while swinging in the dark.

⚔【REALISTIC MOVIE SOUND & SOUND EFFECTS】Huge color range, 4 sound fonts effect, 3 light effects, 7 colors. Real blaster sound, super sensitive, louder and brighter. Letting you cross into the real movie plots, a wonderful.
⚔【USAGE SCENARIOS】The high quality saber sword is perfect for Parties, Outdoor Sports, Family entertainment, Outdoor camping, Christmas and Halloweens Star Wars cosplay.
